title: Treat Obligations as the journey-agnostic core
note: Reduced: one Service, one polished Flow. Journey-agnosticism is realised architecturally — the ObligationEvaluator is parameterised on (model, state) and Flow-ignorant, and the cross-Flow equivalence harness replays every script against flow.json AND the model/skeleton-flow.json fixture to prove the same obligations core drives two different journey adapters. Multi-Service layering stays a README honesty-ledger row.
